## Checklist

- [ ] Follows directory structure under `plans/<team>/<feature>/`
- [ ] Test cases use `TC-<CAT>-NNN.md` naming convention
- [ ] Test case numbering is sequential within each category
- [ ] Links to ADR/Epic/STRAT are included in README.md
